evals.title: X thread for SaaS launch
evals.prompt: We're launching a new project management SaaS for small teams in Japan. Write an X thread to announce the launch and explain key features. Target: startup founders and small business owners.
evals.expected_behavior: Should create a 5-10 post thread with a strong hook in post 1, each post within 280 chars, mix of features and benefits, end with CTA, and include 1-2 relevant Japanese hashtags.

evals.title: Instagram content calendar for bakery
evals.prompt: Create a 1-week Instagram content calendar for a small bakery in Tokyo. They post daily and have good photos of their products.
evals.expected_behavior: Should create a varied weekly plan mixing feed posts, Stories, and Reels with appropriate formats and specs, suggest posting times for Japan, and include content mix (product, behind-the-scenes, educational).

evals.title: TikTok strategy for fashion brand
evals.prompt: We're a Japanese streetwear brand targeting 18-25 year olds. We've never used TikTok. How should we start?
evals.expected_behavior: Should recommend starting with trend participation, explain video specs, suggest content patterns (styling tips, behind-the-scenes, before/after), emphasize trending audio importance, and provide frequency recommendation.

evals.title: B2B LinkedIn strategy for Japan
evals.prompt: We sell HR software to Japanese enterprises. Our LinkedIn page has 200 followers. What should we post to build credibility and generate leads?
evals.expected_behavior: Should note LinkedIn's small but growing Japan market (~4M), recommend personal posts from founders/executives over company page posts, suggest content pillars (HR insights, data, customer stories), and note that Japanese language posts are appropriate.

evals.title: Seasonal content for Golden Week
evals.prompt: Golden Week is coming up. What social media content should we prepare for our travel agency targeting Japanese domestic travelers?
evals.expected_behavior: Should recommend starting content 2-3 weeks before GW, suggest platform-specific content (Instagram Reels of destinations, X threads with travel tips), include relevant seasonal hashtags, and note posting schedule adjustments during the holiday.
